inputs.label: Beginning Inventory
inputs.businessContext: Value of inventory at the start of the accounting period

businessContext_i18n.en: Value of inventory at the start of the accounting period
businessContext_i18n.de: Wert des Lagerbestands zu Beginn des Abrechnungszeitraums
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur du stock au début de la période comptable
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor del inventario al inicio del período contable

inputs.label: Material Purchases
inputs.businessContext: Cost of direct materials purchased during the period

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of direct materials purchased during the period
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem içinde satın alınan doğrudan malzemelerin maliyeti
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten der im Zeitraum eingekauften direkten Materialien
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût des matières premières achetées pendant la période
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de los materiales directos comprados durante el período

inputs.label: Direct Labor
inputs.businessContext: Cost of labor directly involved in production

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of labor directly involved in production
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretimde doğrudan yer alan işçilik maliyeti
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten der direkt in der Produktion eingesetzten Arbeit
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de la main-d'œuvre directement impliquée dans la production
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de la mano de obra directamente involucrada en la producción

inputs.label: Manufacturing Overhead
inputs.businessContext: Indirect production costs such as utilities, rent, and depreciation

businessContext_i18n.en: Indirect production costs such as utilities, rent, and depreciation
businessContext_i18n.tr: Elektrik, kira ve amortisman gibi dolaylı üretim maliyetleri
businessContext_i18n.de: Indirekte Produktionskosten wie Betriebskosten, Miete und Abschreibungen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts de production indirects tels que services publics, loyer et amortissement
businessContext_i18n.es: Costes indirectos de producción como servicios públicos, alquiler y depreciación

inputs.label: Ending Inventory
inputs.businessContext: Value of inventory at the end of the accounting period

businessContext_i18n.en: Value of inventory at the end of the accounting period
businessContext_i18n.de: Wert des Lagerbestands am Ende des Abrechnungszeitraums
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur du stock à la fin de la période comptable
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor del inventario al final del período contable
